publications.title: Utvecklning av bio-briketter för ferrokromproduktion i nedsänkt båugn (Bio4SAF)
publications.authors: E. Mousa, K. Manu, J. Orre, L. Önnhagen

projects.title: Iron Ore Pellet Fines Recycling with Innovative Organic Binders
projects.desc: Developed and characterised novel organic binder systems to maximise the reuse of iron ore pellet fines — typically landfilled waste — back into the iron ore pelletisation process. Work conducted at Swerim AB, Luleå.

projects.title: Biocarbon-Chromite Briquettes for Ferrochrome Production — Bio4SAF
projects.desc: Developed extrusion-based biocarbon-chromite briquettes to partially replace fossil-based reductants in submerged arc furnace (SAF) ferrochrome production. Part of the Swerim Bio4SAF initiative targeting lower CO₂ emissions in ferroalloy production.

projects.title: Nozzle Design & Metal Flow Stability in Continuous Casting
projects.desc: Investigated the influence of submerged entry nozzle (SEN) geometry on metal flow patterns and flow stability in the continuous casting mould. Combined physical and numerical modelling approaches to develop optimised nozzle configurations.

outcomes.text: Improved flow uniformity through nozzle optimisation

projects.title: Lignin-Based Agglomerates for Next-Generation Steelmaking
projects.desc: Developing bio-based agglomerate systems using lignin as a sustainable binder for steel and ferroalloy production, targeting replacement of conventional fossil-derived binders. Collaborative research at Swerim AB with industry partners.

projects.title: Copper-Tin Alloy Characterisation — Comprehensive Review Studies
projects.desc: Conducted extensive literature reviews and experimental characterisation of Cu-Sn and Ti-Cu-Sn alloy systems, covering morphological, mechanical, and thermophysical properties. Results published as two widely cited review articles.

projects.title: Al–Si–Mg–Ni Hypoeutectic Alloy Heat Treatment Optimisation
projects.desc: Studied the effect of solutionising temperature and time on the dendrite morphology and mechanical behaviour of Al-Si-Mg-Ni hypoeutectic alloys. Characterised microstructural evolution using SEM/EDS and correlated with tensile and hardness outcomes.

blog.title: Why Physics-Informed ML Will Outperform Black-Box Models in Steelmaking
blog.excerpt: Pure data-driven models struggle with the sparse, noisy, high-variance data environment of the steel plant. Here's the case for keeping the physics in the loop.

blog.title: The Underestimated Power of Water Models in the Age of CFD
blog.excerpt: When simulation budgets explode and validation data is scarce, a well-designed water model can still outperform a poorly validated numerical model. A defence of experimental analogue methods.

blog.title: Steel Recycling at Scale: The Tramp Element Problem No One Talks About
blog.excerpt: As scrap ratios increase globally, copper contamination becomes a fundamental barrier to quality steel production. What are our real options at the process level?
